# Denver AI

> AI implementation and enablement for Denver-area small and mid-sized businesses.

Denver AI helps local businesses in Denver, Colorado set up and adopt AI systems that reduce admin work, automate follow-up, and handle more volume without adding staff. We focus on practical, working AI — not demos or buzzwords.

## Services

- **AI Implementation**: We map your business, find the friction, and build AI automations around your existing process. No need to replace your current software or hire a tech team.
- **AI Enablement**: We train your team on the AI tools we build so adoption actually happens. We stay involved until it feels normal.

## What We Automate

- Admin work: invoices, quotes, scheduling, paperwork
- Follow-through: follow-up texts and emails, reminders, job status updates
- Customer responsiveness: lead replies, client updates, after-hours coverage
- Lead capture: instant responses to new inquiries, nothing falling through the cracks

## How It Works

1. Book a call — tell us what's slowing you down
2. Diagnose your workflow — we find the highest-impact places to start
3. Build and implement — we set it up, train your team, and stay involved

## Who We Serve

Denver-area small and mid-sized businesses including contractors, medical and dental practices, real estate agents, and professional services firms.

## Location

Denver, Colorado, USA

## Contact

denverai.co
